evidence.quote: Browse like no one’s watching. The new Firefox Focus automatically blocks a wide range of online trackers — from the moment you launch it to the second you leave it. Easily erase your history, passwords and cookies, so you won’t get followed by things like unwanted ads.
Firefox Focus provides automatic ad blocking and tracking protection on an easy-to-use private browser.
We love Pull Requests, Bug Reports, ideas, (security) code reviews or any other kind of positive contribution.
Firefox Focus for Android is getting localized on [Pontoon](https://pontoon.mozilla.org/projects/focus-for-android/).

Sentry is enabled when the *Send Usage Data* switch in the *Focus* settings is enabled by the user. By default this switch is enabled in Focus and is an *opt-out* mechanism. In Klar, by default this switch is disabled and is an *opt-in* mechanism.
